name: Black Forest Chocolate Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups frozen pitted unsweetened dark cherries, coarsely chopped (thawed and well drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Coat a 3- to 4-quart bundt or other tube pan with vegetable cooking spray.
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt. Add brown sugar and mix well.
3. In another bowl, whisk eggs and prune puree; add milk and vanilla. Mix in the dry ingredients alternately until just combined.
4. Pour boiling water into a measuring cup. Stir in espresso powder and baking soda. Add egg mixture to this and stir to combine.
5. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan. Scatter cherries and walnuts evenly over the batter.
6. Pour remaining batter on top.
7. Bake in the center of the oven for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow to cool in the pan for 15 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Dust with powdered sugar and place on a serving plate. Fill the cake center with additional cherries and garnish with mint.
Prune puree:
Combine 1 1/3 cups (8 ounces) pitted prunes and 6 tablespoons hot water in a food processor. Pulse until finely chopped. Makes about 1 cup.
